<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:勘解由小路]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:勘解由小路]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:勘解由小路]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:勘解由小路]]


{{Citation needed|date=July 2018}}
'''Kadenokōji''' (かでのこうじ, かげゆこうじ) refers to a street in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}} (formerly {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|qid=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō|1=Heian-kyō}}).

== Overview ==
Kadenokōji corresponds to the modern-day [[Shimodachiuri Street]]. The name originates from the [[Ritsuryō system]] institution of the [[Kadenokōji-shi]], an extralegal administrative office.

== Related Articles ==
* [[Kadenokōji family]] (勘解由小路家)
* [[Kadenokōji-shi]] - An extralegal office under the Japanese [[Ritsuryō system]].

{{Japanese-history-stub}}
{{translated page|ja|勘解由小路|version=97911030|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ja:勘解由小路]]

<!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji--><!--Kadenokōji-->
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{wikidata link|Q11400103}}
[[Category:Streets in Kyoto]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
